scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && uv sync --project backend --dev
scripts.db:migrate: uv run --project backend alembic -c backend/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.dev: npm run db:migrate && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "uv run --project backend uvicorn backend.api.app:create_app --factory --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" "until python -c \"import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/health', timeout=1)\" >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.2; done; npm run dev --prefix frontend"
